subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 18/26] server41tests: test DELEGRETURN stops notifications

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite, specifically designed to verify that notifications are stopped when a delegation is returned using the DELEGRETURN operation. The test creates a directory delegation with ADD_ENTRY notifications enabled, immediately returns it, and then creates a file from a second client. It verifies that no callbacks are received after the delegation was returned, indicating that the notifications were successfully stopped.
